query:
UPDATE channels
        SET
            name = CASE
                WHEN $1 = '' THEN name
                ELSE NULLIF($2, '')::text
            END,
            current_profile = CASE
                WHEN $3 = '' THEN current_profile
                ELSE NULLIF($4, '')::text
            END,
            current_provider = CASE
                WHEN $5 = '' THEN current_provider
                ELSE NULLIF($6, '')::text
            END,
            current_model = CASE
                WHEN $7 = '' THEN current_model
                ELSE NULLIF($8, '')::text
            END,
            closed = $9,
            planning_mode = CASE
                WHEN $10 = '' THEN planning_mode
                ELSE NULLIF($11, '')::text
            END,
            template = CASE
                WHEN $12 = '' THEN template
                ELSE NULLIF($13, '')::text
            END,
            updated_at = NOW()
        WHERE id = $14
